title: McDonald Food Texture Pack
description: Food type from McDonald with more unique texture.
body:
**https://discord.gg/t2YMpWa2qa**

**McDonald Food Texture Pack V3 by ItzAX0LOTL**

_When rename in anvil:_

- Apple > Pear
- Beetroot Soup > Strawberry Soup, Cold Soup
- Mushroom Stew > Smashed Potato, Ramen
- Suspicious Stew > Cereal, Salad
- Sweet Berries > Blueberries, Black Berries, Yellow Raspberry, Raspberry
- Spider Eye > Eggchan
- Pumpkin Pie > Pancakes
- Porkchop > Raw Bacon
- Cooked Porkchop > Cooked Bacon
- Cooked Salmon > Fish
- Honey Bottle > Sprite, Coca Cola, Fanta, Lipton Ice Tea, Hot Chocolate
- Golden Carrot > Banana, Strawberry
- Milk Bucket > Water Ice Cream,  Sweet Berries Ice Cream, Melon Popsicle, McFlurry Chocolate, McFlurry, Ice Cream, Cookie Ice Cream, Chorus Ice Cream, Cake Ice Cream, Apple Ice Cream
- Bread > Brownie, Candycane, Chocolate Muffin, Gummy Bear

_Without Renaming:_

- Baked Potato > McFries
- Cooked Beef > Cheese Burger
- Cooked Chicken > Chicken Nuggets
- Cooked Mutton > Kebab
- Cooked Porkchop > Big Mac
- Gold Nugget > Gold Coin
- Iron Nugget > Silver Coin 
- Golden Carrot > Cheese 
- Honey bottle > Lemonade
- Red Bundle > Happy Meal
